REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DAVID ABRAMOVITZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 11, 2018. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS (OPPOSITION AND REPLY) NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 21, 2018 WITH COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DAVID ABRAMOVITZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. DEFENDANT DEMURS TO THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT (SEE NOTICE OF DEMURRER). DEFENDANT FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT A DEMURRER MAY BE SUSTAINED TO A CAUSE OF ACTION NOT ASSERTED AGAINST THIS DEFENDANT. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE CHARLES HAINES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Dewys, esq. (415-970-8012) of Danfoura Law Offices for Plaintiff/opposing party Azizeh Bajjaliya, et al.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DAVID ABRAMOVITZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Defendant demurs to the entire complaint (See Notice of Demurrer). Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a demurrer may be sustained to a cause of action not asserted against this defendant. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge Charles Haines, Clerk S. Le, not reported (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Continued To Oct-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT DAVID ABRAMOVITZ DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to October 11, 2018. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings (opposition and reply) no later than September 21, 2018 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
